auth.signInSubtitle: Use Google or your development email.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Sign up as a student with your email. In production you can switch to Google-only if you prefer.
auth.devOnlyHint: Development mode: use any email that exists in the database. Seeded demo teacher:
auth.devSignInError: No user found for that email. Sign up first or use the seed teacher email.
auth.signUpError: Could not create account. Try again.
auth.misconfigured: Sign-in is not configured. Set AUTH_GOOGLE_ID and AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET, or run in development without them to use email sign-in.
